# Brickwise

> Independent analytics platform for tokenized real estate. Brickwise scores fractional property tokens on Lofty and RealT for yield, risk, neighborhood quality, and fair value, then publishes daily buy/hold/avoid signals for retail investors.

## What we cover

- Tokenized real estate platforms: RealT (realt.co), Lofty (lofty.ai)
- Asset class: fractional residential rental property tokens (ERC-20 on Ethereum / Algorand SPL)
- Geography: primarily United States (Detroit, Chicago, Cleveland, St Louis, and 30+ other cities)
- Data: ~470 properties tracked manually with source verification, no scraping

## How we score

Each property is scored 0–100 across yield (net of fees), risk (vacancy, neighborhood, age), fair value (token price vs underlying), and confidence in the data. The top-line action is one of Buy, Hold, or Avoid. See /analyzer for the full ranking and filter UI.

## Key pages

- /                                      — Daily decision engine: best pick, strong buys, properties to avoid
- /analyzer                              — Filter and rank all 470+ properties by yield, risk, score
- /property/{id}                         — Full analysis for a single property
- /city/{slug}                           — All tracked properties in a given city
- /algorand                              — Algorand DeFi/RWA ecosystem map (Lofty's chain)
- /compare/realt-vs-lofty                — Head-to-head platform comparison
- /learn/what-is-tokenized-real-estate   — Primer for new investors
- /learn/realt-review                    — RealT platform review
- /learn/how-to-invest-in-tokenized-real-estate
- /market                                — Daily market updates and yield-curve commentary
- /rankings/highest-yield                — Top yielding properties
- /about                                 — Who runs Brickwise
- /contact                               — How to reach us

## Crawling guidance

- All marketing and property pages are SSR-rendered with full HTML — no JavaScript required to read content.
- Sitemap: https://brickwise.pro/sitemap.xml
- robots.txt: https://brickwise.pro/robots.txt
- Property data updates daily; a `lastModified` value in the sitemap tracks freshness per page.

## What we are not

- Not a brokerage, exchange, or token issuer. We do not custody assets.
- Not financial advice. Scores are analytics, not recommendations to transact.
- Not affiliated with RealT or Lofty.
